observations: Bidding phase label and active actor are visible in the footer.
Pass, misere, and ordered bid controls are visible and understandable.
Current trick area displays the bidding state message with no overlap or clipping.
Contract phase label and active actor are visible in the footer.
Pass, whist, and half-whist controls are visible and enabled for the human actor.
Current trick area displays the whist decision state message with no overlap or clipping.
Play phase label and active actor are visible in the footer.
The current trick area shows two played cards plus the play message.
Only the legal human card is enabled; disabled cards are visibly distinct.
All-pass context is visible in the log, with play phase and active actor visible in the footer.
Legal playable cards are visible and enabled for the human actor.
Current trick area is present and nonblank with no text overflow or clipping.
Misere context is visible in the log, with play phase and active actor visible in the footer.
Legal playable cards are visible and enabled for the human actor.
No whist controls are shown in the misere play state.
Deal-settlement phase label and active actor are visible in the footer.
Settlement summary is visible in the current state area.
Settle action is visible and enabled, with no overlap or clipping.
Next-deal phase label and active actor are visible in the footer.
Previous deal summary is visible in the current state area.
Start-next-deal action is visible and enabled, with no overlap or clipping.
